name: Coupon: View

description.en: Look up a coupon code on-chain — see the discount, usage count, expiry, and status.
description.de: Gutscheincode on-chain nachschlagen — Rabatt, Nutzungsanzahl, Ablaufdatum und Status ansehen.
description.fr: Recherchez un code promo on-chain — voyez la réduction, les utilisations, l'expiration et le statut.
description.es: Consulta un código de cupón on-chain — ve el descuento, usos, vencimiento y estado.
description.ro: Caută un cod de cupon on-chain — vezi reducerea, numărul de utilizări, expirarea și statusul.

bot: Fetches coupon details by code. Shows discount percentage, usage limits, how many times it's been redeemed, expiry, and whether it's active or revoked.

success.fr: {{DISCOUNT}}% de réduction · {{USED_COUNT}} sur {{MAX_USES}} utilisations (0 = illimité) · révoqué : {{IS_REVOKED}}
success.es: {{DISCOUNT}}% de descuento · {{USED_COUNT}} de {{MAX_USES}} usos (0 = ilimitado) · revocado: {{IS_REVOKED}}
